THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIDENOST, HELEN STOUT, ORIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 538 28TH AVE, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-01-1993, IF DEFS. FAIL TO VACATE 9-15-93 MONEY JUDGMENT TO ISSUE FOR $700 R&D & $1200 ATTY FEES & COSTS. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.

OF PREMISES AT 538 28TH AVE. - FORFEITURE OF RENTAL/LEASE AGREEMENT - EVICTION STAYED TO 9-15-93 - IF DEFS VACATE BY 9-15-93, PL. WAIVES MONEY JUDGMENT & WILL RETURN $1,050 SECURITY DEPOSIT - IF DEFS DON'T VACATE WRIT MAY ISSUE 9-16-93 WITH MONEY JUDGMENT OF $1,900 AND PER DIEM OF $23.30 PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
